name: White Tassel Hamburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ground sirloin, baby food beef, and broth together well. Place in the refrigerator for at least 3 hours or overnight.
2. Add hot water to the dry onions to hydrate them. Form small hamburgers.
3. Heat a frying pan over medium heat. Make holes in each hamburger with the end of a spoon before placing them in the pan.
4. While frying, continue to make holes in the burgers to ensure even cooking.
5. Before turning off the heat, place sliced onions on top of each burger.
6. Place buns on top, with the bottom of the buns facing down so they will be steamed warm.
7. Garnish with pickle, ketchup, and mustard.
